input.student_response: I figured out that the plant needs sunlight by trying to block the light and watching what happened. I think if we could store the energy from plants we could help feed people in places that don't have much sun.

rubric_definitions.reasoning_strategy: Uses systematic thinking or a clear method to approach the problem.
rubric_definitions.use_of_evidence: Draws on observations or data to support conclusions.
rubric_definitions.creativity_application: Applies ideas in novel or imaginative ways.
rubric_definitions.collaboration: Works productively with others (solo tasks: not observed).
rubric_definitions.reflection_metacognition: Shows awareness of own thinking or learning process.
rubric_definitions.problem_understanding: Accurately grasps the scope and nature of the problem.
